title: calea multiplinervia var. angustifolia
intro: Calea multiplinervia var. angustifolia, also known as Mexican Dream Herb, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family and is native to Mexico. Its medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of flavonoids, saponins, and sesquiterpenes, which are known to possess sedative, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness, as well as its potential in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Calea multiplinervia var. angustifolia can be prepared as teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
